name: DLF Limited
overview: DLF is India's largest publicly listed real estate company, with a track record of over 75 years of luxury residential developments, notably defining the modern skyline of Gurgaon with ultra-luxury golf course communities.

name: Lodha Group
overview: Lodha Group (Macrotech Developers) is synonymous with ultra-luxury skyscrapers and premium branded residences, engineering iconic architectural landmarks like the World Towers and Lodha Altamount in Mumbai.

name: Prestige Group
overview: Prestige Group has shaped the sky-lines of South India across residential, commercial, and retail sectors, delivering award-winning integrated townships like Prestige Lakeside Habitat and high-end retail hubs like UB City.

name: Godrej Properties
overview: Godrej Properties brings the Godrej Group philosophy of innovation, sustainability, and trust to the real estate sector, creating wellness-focused luxury homes and green townships across India.

name: Sobha Limited
overview: Sobha is India's only backward-integrated real estate developer, known for setting the absolute benchmark in construction quality, structural engineering, and precision craftsmanship.

name: Tata Housing
overview: A subsidiary of the legendary Tata Group, Tata Housing focuses on creating value-driven luxury residences and sustainable communities built on the foundations of trust, ethics, and architectural excellence.

name: Embassy Group
overview: Embassy Group is a pioneer in luxury residential villas and high-end IT tech parks, delivering international-standard luxury spaces like Embassy Lake Terraces and luxury hospitality hubs.
